legendarymage.configuration.title: Legendary Mage Configs
legendarymage.configuration.resurrection: Spell power multiplier for Resurrection Rune spell. Higher values make spell power more effective.
Whether to enable buff effects for players and summons within the resurrection rune area.
Interval in ticks between buff applications. 20 ticks = 1 second.
Buff strength multiplier. Higher values make buffs stronger.
legendarymage.configuration.pyromaniac.e: Base explosion power for Pyro Flame effect when entity dies.
Additional explosion power per buff level.
Whether Pyro Flame explosion can destroy blocks (recommend off to protect buildings).
Whether Pyro Flame explosion can cause fire.
legendarymage.configuration.pyromaniac.a: Whether Pyromaniac spell can affect allies (default off).
Whether Pyromaniac spell can affect summons (default off).
legendarymage.configuration.implosion.sp: Spell power multiplier for Implosion spell. Higher values make spell power more effective.
legendarymage.configuration.implosion.pu: Pull strength for Implosion spell. Higher values pull enemies faster.
legendarymage.configuration.implosion.ex: Delay in ticks between pull and explosion for Implosion spell.
legendarymage.configuration.implosion.fi: Duration in seconds that targets are set on fire after explosion.
legendarymage.configuration.buffInterval: Interval in ticks between buff applications
spell.legendarymage.resurrection_rune.gu: Create a zone centered on yourself that turns the ground into a cradle of undeath. All creatures that die within this zone will be converted into undead. Spell power affects range, duration, and undead attributes.
spell.legendarymage.resurrection_rune.ca: §cResurrection Rune activated!§r Duration: %d seconds, Range: %d blocks, Spell Power: %s
spell.legendarymage.resurrection_rune.re: §cResurrection Rune can only be used on the surface!
spell.legendarymage.pyromaniac.guide: Spread §cPyro Flame§r buff to nearby enemies. Pyro Flame is similar to Wither effect, dealing continuous fire damage, but when an entity with Pyro Flame dies, it triggers a small explosion.
spell.legendarymage.pyromaniac.cast_succ: §cPyromaniac§r released! Affected %d targets, Range: %d blocks, Buff Level: %d
effect.legendarymage.pyro_flame.descript: Continuous fire damage, triggers explosion on death
spell.legendarymage.implosion.guide: Pull nearby enemies at the targeted location toward the center, then trigger a fiery explosion. Spell power affects range and damage.
spell.legendarymage.living_ice_sculpture: Create a zone where ice sculptures naturally form. The sculptures won't die naturally and have high health. After a certain time, the sculptures shatter and emit fragments, while spawning an ice sculpture creature at each sculpture's location. Ice sculpture creatures are summons that protect the caster and attack hostile entities.
§bLiving Ice Sculpture§r released! Range: %s blocks, Duration: %d seconds, Spell Power: %s
spell.legendarymage.blizzard.guide: Select a target and create a blizzard area at their location. Enemies within this area take frost damage every 0.5 seconds and are slowed. Spell level and spell power affect range and damage.
legendarymage.configuration.livingIceScu: Configuration for Living Ice Sculpture spell
Interval between spawning new sculptures, in ticks (20 ticks = 1 second)
Maximum number of sculptures that can exist simultaneously per spell cast
legendarymage.configuration.maxSculpture: Maximum number that can exist simultaneously
legendarymage.configuration.livingIceScu: Time before sculpture transforms into living ice sculpture (20 ticks = 1 second)
Additional health per point of spell power
legendarymage.configuration.healthPerSpe: Health added per spell power point
legendarymage.configuration.livingIceScu: Base attack damage of living ice sculptures
Additional attack damage per point of spell power
legendarymage.configuration.damagePerSpe: Attack added per spell power point
legendarymage.configuration.livingIceScu: Base damage when sculpture shatters upon defeat
Additional shatter damage per point of spell power
legendarymage.configuration.shatterDamag: Shatter damage added per spell power point
legendarymage.configuration.livingIceScu: Time before living ice sculpture naturally breaks (20 ticks = 1 second)
legendarymage.configuration.blizzard.spe: Blizzard spell power multiplier. Higher values make spell power more effective.
legendarymage.configuration.blizzard.bas: Base damage per tick of blizzard
legendarymage.configuration.blizzard.dam: Interval between damage ticks (ticks), 20 ticks = 1 second
legendarymage.configuration.blizzard.aff: Whether blizzard spell can affect allied players
Whether blizzard spell can affect summons
legendarymage.configuration.baseDamage.t: Base damage per tick of blizzard
legendarymage.configuration.damageInterv: Interval between damage ticks (ticks), 20 ticks = 1 second
spell.legendarymage.elemental_burst.guid: Release the power of elements, rotating between §cFire§r, §bIce§r, and §9Lightning§r damage. Each element's damage is calculated separately with its corresponding school spell power bonus. Fire causes burning, Ice causes slowness, Lightning causes weakness.
Enable debug log output for troubleshooting
legendarymage.configuration.elementReact: Whether to output debug information for element reactions to console, including mark application, upgrades, and reaction triggers
legendarymage.configuration.elementalBur: Whether to output debug information for Elemental Burst to console
legendarymage.configuration.elementReact: Whether to output debug information for Element Reactions to console
legendarymage.configuration.triDirection: Whether to output debug information for Tri-Directional Arrow to console
legendarymage.configuration.trailSystemD: Whether to output debug information for Trail System to console
legendarymage.configuration.echoStrikeDe: Whether to output debug information for Echo Strike to console
legendarymage.configuration.elementalPri: Whether to output debug information for Elemental Prism to console
legendarymage.configuration.elementalBar: Whether to output debug information for Elemental Barrage to console
subtitles.legendarymage.when_you_look_at: Music Disc - When You Look At Me
jukebox_song.legendarymage.when_you_look: Vexento - When You Look At Me
effect.legendarymage.blood_mark.descript: Blood element mark, can trigger element reactions
effect.legendarymage.holy_mark.descripti: Holy element mark, can trigger element reactions
effect.legendarymage.eldritch_mark.descr: Eldritch element mark, can trigger element reactions
effect.legendarymage.poison_mark.descrip: Poison element mark, can trigger element reactions
effect.legendarymage.fire_mark.descripti: Fire element mark, can trigger element reactions
effect.legendarymage.ice_mark.descriptio: Ice element mark, can trigger element reactions
effect.legendarymage.lightning_mark.desc: Lightning element mark, can trigger element reactions
effect.legendarymage.ender_mark.descript: Ender element mark, can trigger element reactions
effect.legendarymage.chaos_buff.descript: Buff from Eldritch-Scarlet element reaction, increases spell power
effect.legendarymage.ender_echo_buff.des: Buff from Ender element reaction, increases spell power and resistance
effect.legendarymage.armor_reduction.des: Debuff from Poison element reaction, reduces armor value
effect.legendarymage.darkness_buff.descr: Debuff from Blood element reaction, reduces spell resistance
effect.legendarymage.electrocuted_buff.d: Debuff from Lightning element reaction, periodically releases chain lightning
Blade school special buff, infuses mana into weapon to release through melee attacks
spell.legendarymage.magic_shotgun.guide: Infuse mana into your weapon and release it through melee attacks. §cCost§r: Loses element reactions and partial spell power. §nTwo-stage casting§r: First cast gains buff, second cast removes buff. During buff duration, spells won't release after casting but trigger on melee attacks.
spell.legendarymage.ice_explosion_cone.g: An ice cone infused with excessive mana, becoming extremely unstable. Triggers an ice explosion upon hitting enemies, dealing damage and applying slowness to enemies within range.
spell.legendarymage.focused_ice_cone.gui: Sacrifices the area of effect for more concentrated and stable mana. Guaranteed to freeze enemies on hit, can pierce through 3 enemies. After piercing 3 targets or hitting a wall, triggers a massive ice explosion. High speed, higher damage.
spell.legendarymage.giant_snowball.guide: First creates a small snow block above your head that grows larger with chanting time. When chanting ends or is interrupted, it is released, causing a massive ice explosion upon impact and leaving a 10-second blizzard field. Longer chanting time means higher damage.
